name: XML Injection (aka Blind XPath Injection)
description: The product does not properly neutralize special XML characters in user-controlled input before incorporating it into XML documents or XPath queries, allowing attackers to alter XML structure, inject new elements, or modify query logic.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing XML metacharacters (<, >, &, ', ") that is incorporated into XML documents or XPath queries at TRANSFORM[xml_construction] or EXTERNAL[xpath_query] without a TRANSFORM[xml_encoding] node that escapes XML-significant characters
